violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice was voluntarily disposed of. Ice machine was turned off. Establishment is to have ice machine professionally cleaned and sanitized. Establishment is to provide photos of cleaned and sanitized ice machine to RIDOH before resuming use of ice machine. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2025
The gasket on the prep unit was not in good repair does not seal. Gaskets must be in proper working order. New Violation. Correct By: 01/11/2026
The gasket for the lettuce one door lowboy was observed in poor repair. Establishment is to replace gasket. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024
